title: Adani Power Limited Submits SEBI Compliance Certificate for Q4FY26 - scanx.trade
content:
Adani Power Limited Submits SEBI Compliance Certificate for Q4FY26
Adani Power Limited has submitted its quarterly compliance certificate under SEBI regulation 74(5) for Q4FY26 to BSE and NSE on April 2, 2026. KFin Technologies Limited, serving as the company's Registrar and Share Transfer Agent, issued the certificate confirming proper reporting of securities transactions to all relevant stock exchanges and depositories during the quarter ended March 31, 2026.
*this image is generated using AI for illustrative purposes only.
Adani Power Limited has completed its quarterly regulatory compliance by submitting the mandatory certificate under regulation 74(5) of SEBI (Depositories and Participants) Regulation 2018 for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. The submission was made to both BSE Limited and National Stock Exchange of India Limited on April 2, 2026.
Regulatory Compliance Details
The certificate was issued by KFin Technologies Limited, which serves as the Registrar and Share Transfer Agent (RTA) for Adani Power Limited. The compliance documentation confirms that all required details of securities dematerialized and rematerialized during the quarter have been properly furnished to stock exchanges where the company's shares are listed.
Stock Exchange Communications
The compliance certificate was formally submitted to both major Indian stock exchanges. Company Secretary Puneet Bansal signed and submitted the documentation to BSE Limited (Scrip Code: 533096) and National Stock Exchange of India Limited (Scrip Code: ADANIPOWER).
Depository Confirmations
KFin Technologies Limited, acting as the company's registrar, issued separate certificates to both National Securities Depository Limited (NSDL) and Central Depository Services (India) Limited (CDSL). Deputy Vice President Ganesh Chandra Patro signed these certificates on behalf of KFin Technologies Limited, confirming compliance with SEBI regulations.
Corporate Information
Adani Power Limited operates from its registered office at "Adani Corporate House," Shantigram, Near Vaishno Devi Circle, S. G. Highway, Khodiyar, Ahmedabad-382421, Gujarat. The company maintains its Corporate Identification Number (CIN) as L40100GJ1996PLC030533.
